privileged_info_summary: The Muncie example project data is authentic tutorial data distributed with the official HEC-RAS 6.6 Linux build by the US Army Corps of Engineers. Inspection of the boundary conditions file (Muncie.b04) confirms it defines an 'Upstream Flow Hydrograph' for River: White, Reach: Muncie, RS: 15696.24. The original file specifically lists a peak flow of 21000 at hours 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, and 20. The task's instructions correctly align with this underlying data, requiring the peak flow of 21000 to be increased to 25200 (a 20% increase) across these specific hours.
